addition.item: Added a dedicated Joomla menu item type for the frontend notification centre.
Added a Mark All as Read action to the paginated View All page.
Added read-state updates when notification articles are opened from the View All page.
Added a Joomla Privacy plugin for exporting and removing registered-user notification read-state data.
Added a system cleanup plugin for removing orphaned read-state records when Joomla users or JT Content Notify module instances are deleted.
Added MySQL, MariaDB, and PostgreSQL update schema support.
Added a server-side fallback URL for the View All link when JavaScript or AJAX is unavailable.

change.item: Preserved the active Itemid, language, and menu context in notification AJAX requests.
Added validation for module publication dates, language, access level, enabled state, and menu assignments.
Synchronised guest localStorage read state between the notification dropdown and the View All page.
Applied the module category and date visibility settings to the View All page.
Moved frontend presentation styles to Joomla Web Asset Manager assets for improved Content Security Policy compatibility.
Replaced the hard-coded administrator version number with dynamically loaded extension metadata.
Paused automatic notification refresh while the browser tab is hidden.
Improved Joomla 6.1 and PHP 8.3 compatibility metadata.
Replaced public exception details with generic JSON error responses and server-side error logging.

fix.item: Fixed guest notifications appearing unread again after opening the View All page.
Fixed notification articles remaining unread after being opened from the View All page.
Fixed incorrect article routing on multilingual and menu-assigned pages.
Fixed notification data being accessible through unpublished, expired, language-mismatched, inaccessible, or incorrectly assigned module instances.
Fixed View All links becoming unusable when JavaScript or AJAX loading failed.
Fixed concurrent read-state writes causing duplicate database key conflicts.
Fixed category and date visibility settings being ignored on the View All page.
Fixed internal exception and database details being exposed in AJAX error responses.
Removed unsupported element nodes from the package, component, and module installation manifests.
Kept package language discovery based on the PKG_JTCONTENTNOTIFY manifest name and pkg_jtcontentnotify.sys.ini file.

change.item: Refined the administrator Support and Resources card with a cleaner adaptive list-group layout.
Aligned external-link indicators with support link titles for a more compact layout.
Improved the English and Turkish support descriptions.

addition.item: Added a Support and Resources card to the administrator dashboard.
Added official JoomTheme website, GitHub repository, and JED profile links.

change.item: External support links now open securely in a new tab with accessible helper text.

fix.item: Added GPLv2-or-later licence headers to every PHP file for JED compliance.
Added package system language files for English and Turkish.

addition.item: Added the Joomla extension update server definition.
Added package, component, and module changelog integration.
Added SHA-256 verification data to the update definition.

change.item: Standardised licence metadata in all extension manifests.

addition.item: Moved the View All page to Joomla ListModel and core pagination.
Added a configurable number of articles per page.

fix.item: Improved the unread indicator and title/category alignment on the View All page.

addition.item: Added component Options and Joomla ACL permissions.

fix.item: Improved the responsive dropdown layout and language strings.
Corrected the package name shown during uninstall.

addition.item: Initial release with Joomla core article notifications, unread state, and a Bootstrap 5 dropdown.
